changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE ma_roles ( id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, description TEXT NOT NULL, created_by TEXT NOT NULL, created_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, modified_by TEXT NOT NULL, modified_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE ma_users ( id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, first_name TEXT NOT NULL, last_name TEXT NOT NULL, birth_date DATE NOT NULL, gender TEXT NOT NULL, role_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES ma_roles (id), email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, password_hash TEXT NOT NULL, user_consent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, created_by TEXT NOT NULL, created_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, modified_by TEXT NOT NULL, modified_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO ma_roles VALUES ('5be49ea4-ed9f-4464-a0a0-6a8795777370', 'ADMIN', 'Роль администратора', 'system', now(), 'system', now()); INSERT INTO ma_roles VALUES ('9c25b8ba-a7cd-4203-9957-9911ad7cdfe4', 'USER', 'Роль пользователя', 'system', now(), 'system', now());
changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM ma_roles WHERE name = 'ADMIN'; DELETE FROM ma_roles WHERE name = 'USER';

changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.comment: Добавление записи администратора в таблицу ma_users
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO ma_users VALUES ('ffa1fcc4-537c-438d-b1c8-ce08ff47ff6c', 'ADMIN_FN', 'ADMIN_LN', '2000-01-01', 'MALE', '5be49ea4-ed9f-4464-a0a0-6a8795777370', 'admin@gmail.com', '$2a$10$/cpSXEg1e1ZGUyvzFgiIC.Km7feQAI8j2GNcrdTmtcY7ljI3Fr5o6', false, 'system', now(), 'system', now());
